name: How long do I have to file a case against a Houston firm for bad AI referral?
description: 2 years from discovery in TX; don't delay.

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a case against a Houston firm for bad AI referral?

acceptedAnswer.text: 2 years from discovery in TX; don't delay.
acceptedAnswer.description: In Texas, the statute for legal malpractice is 2 years from when you knew or should have known of the error. Act fast as discovery rule applies. Key factors: (1) Date harm discovered; (2) Continuous representation tolling; (3) Written notice required pre-suit. Track timelines meticulously. Consult a Texas malpractice expert immediately to avoid missing deadlines.
